message:
♿ fix: replace low-contrast gray text with semantic classes (#8553) (#8574)

Replace 20 instances of text-slate-200, text-slate-300, text-gray-200,
and text-gray-300 with semantic Tailwind classes (text-foreground,
text-muted-foreground) that maintain proper WCAG AA contrast ratios
across both dark and light themes.

Files changed:
- PodLogs.tsx: text-slate-200 → text-foreground (log output)
- DrasiReactiveGraph.tsx: text-slate-300 → text-muted-foreground
  (buttons, labels) and text-foreground (data values)
- PreflightFailure.tsx: text-gray-300 → text-muted-foreground,
  hover:text-gray-200 → hover:text-foreground
- FlightPlanBlueprint.tsx: text-slate-300 → text-foreground (metrics)
- FeatureKagent.tsx: text-slate-300 → text-muted-foreground,
  border-slate-700 → border-border, hover:bg-slate-800 → hover:bg-secondary

Fixes #8553

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

{label} - {display}{pctVal != null ? ` (${pctVal}%)` : ''} + {display}{pctVal != null ? ` (${pctVal}%)` : ''}
{pctVal != null && (

@@ -125,7 +125,7 @@ export function FeatureKagent() {

+              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg border border-border text-muted-foreground font-medium hover:bg-secondary transition-colors"
             >
               kagent.dev
               <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
